overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character running through a neon-lit futuristic city at dusk, transitioning from artificial purple and cyan lighting under overpasses to natural golden hour sunlight as they navigate streets and covered walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit intersection with crosswalk beneath elevated highway

events.description: character transitions from standing still to beginning forward movement

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk waiting for traffic to pass, observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large curved concrete overpass structure with purple neon underlighting
broad pedestrian crosswalk with yellow stripes and red WAIT text markings
illuminated commercial signage with cyan and red neon lighting
black and yellow striped safety bollards at sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a neon-lit intersection beneath an elevated highway, waiting as futuristic vehicles pass by. The scene is dominated by purple neon lighting from the overpass above and the yellow striped crosswalk markings on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with neon furniture

events.description: lighting shifts to deeper red tones as character moves further under the overpass

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing glowing benches and other pedestrians

entered.detail: futuristic public benches with embedded glowing pink and cyan neon strips
vertical red neon sign for Diamond hotel mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, illuminated by red and pink neon lights reflecting off the wet pavement. Futuristic benches with neon strips line the right side while traffic moves on the road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk leading into covered arcade entrance

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk to cross the street toward the covered walkway
entering the covered arcade area with dramatic purple artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk alongside other pedestrians, then entering the covered walkway entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking alongside ego across the crosswalk

entered.detail: green painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
large arched entrance to covered pedestrian tunnel with purple neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, moving from the open road into the entrance of a covered pedestrian arcade. The lighting transitions from mixed natural and artificial to deep purple neon as the character approaches the tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with color-changing neon arches

events.description: neon lighting shifts from purple to cyan/blue along the arch structures
exiting the covered arcade into open street with bright sunset lighting

agents.ego_description: running through the covered corridor as the neon lighting shifts colors, approaching the bright sunset visible at the tunnel exit

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow top and white pants walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: series of curved concrete arches with embedded color-changing neon light strips
bright golden sunlight visible at the far end of the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered pedestrian arcade featuring dramatic curved arches with shifting purple and cyan neon lighting. The corridor leads toward a bright exit where golden sunset light streams in, creating a stark contrast with the artificial neon interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with holographic billboards at sunset

events.description: emerging into bright golden hour sunlight with natural backlighting
character makes slight right turn while continuing to run along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running along the open sidewalk bathed in warm sunset light, passing holographic advertisements and palm trees

entered.detail: large digital advertisement screens displaying fashion models with glowing frames
tropical palm trees lining the right side of the street
futuristic building with curved glass facade reflecting the sunset
bright orange and yellow sunset sky visible between the buildings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered arcade into an open commercial street bathed in golden hour sunlight. Holographic billboards and palm trees line the sidewalk while the setting sun creates long shadows and warm reflections on the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban underpass that eventually opens into a sunlit commercial district. It begins at a neon-lit intersection beneath an elevated highway, where purple light dominates the scene and yellow crosswalk markings line the ground. As the character begins to run, the environment shifts toward red and pink neon reflections on wet pavement and glowing futuristic benches before the camera follows them across the street and into the mouth of a covered pedestrian arcade. The scene then transitions into a corridor of dramatic curved arches with shifting purple and cyan lighting, which gradually leads toward a bright exit where golden sunset light begins to stream in. Finally, the camera emerges from the artificial glow into an open street bathed in warm golden hour sunlight, passing holographic billboards and palm trees under a setting sun.
